java.title: ☕ Java Server Setup
java.text:
1. Download server.jar
2. Run: java -Xmx2G -Xms1G -jar server.jar nogui
3. Open eula.txt and set eula=true
4. Run server again ✅

bedrock.title: 🟩 Bedrock Server Setup
bedrock.text:
1. Download Bedrock Dedicated Server
2. Extract files
3. Edit server.properties
4. Run bedrock_server.exe
Default port: UDP 19132

port.title: 🌐 Port Forwarding
port.text:
Java: TCP 25565
Bedrock: UDP 19132

Steps:
1. Login router
2. Find Port Forwarding
3. Add server local IP
4. Add port
5. Save settings
